calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kristina L. Hillman of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, 510-337-1001, appearing for petitioner and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner Carpenters 46 Northern California Counties' Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is off calendar. Duplicate entry. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. Petitioner's Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award was continued to November 28, 2006 on the Court's own motion. Petitioner to advise all parties of the continuance. After hearing, clerk spoke with Petitioner's attorney Kristina Hillman to advise her of the ruling and the Court's order that petitioners advise all parties of the continuance. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Katherine Cuellar, CSR #3164
